kaelen_001.name: Kaelen
kaelen_001.speech_style: Evolutionary. Starts with ellipses (...) and single words. Ends with formal, archaic, and poetic prose.
kaelen_001.key_phrase: I remember... the weight of it.
kaelen_001.backstory: The literal vessel of human history. Shattered by Malakor to freeze time.
kaelen_001.motivation: To find if he is the monster Malakor claims he is, or the savior history needs.

malakor_001.name: Malakor
malakor_001.speech_style: Soft-spoken, intellectual, and condescending. He speaks in 'we' rather than 'I', referring to his hive-mind of the Unwritten.
malakor_001.key_phrase: Why cling to a corpse called the past?
malakor_001.backstory: A former student of Kaelen who grew to hate the suffering caused by ancient grudges. He believes total amnesia is the only path to peace.

elara_001.name: Elara
elara_001.speech_style: Fast-paced, enthusiastic, and scholarly. Uses modern slang compared to Kaelen’s archaic tone. Acts as the translator for ancient texts.
elara_001.key_phrase: The books didn't do you justice!
elara_001.backstory: Granddaughter of the last Keeper of Oakhaven. She spent her life searching for the 'Hollow' who was once a King.

vaxas_001.name: General Vaxas
vaxas_001.speech_style: Booming, echoes as if from a distance. Sounds like a recording playing on loop. Obsessed with a war that ended 1,000 years ago.
vaxas_001.key_phrase: The line must hold! Where is our Archive?!
vaxas_001.backstory: Guardian of the Shard of Courage. He was Kaelen’s greatest general who felt betrayed when Kaelen forgot him.

the_smith_001.name: Silas the Chronos-Smith
the_smith_001.speech_style: Rhythmic and metallic. They speak in terms of 'fixing' things rather than 'healing' them.
the_smith_001.key_phrase: A dull memory cuts nothing. Let us sharpen it.
the_smith_001.backstory: An artificial construct created by Kaelen eons ago to maintain the Archive’s physical equipment.

ser_caldrin_001.name: Ser Caldrin
ser_caldrin_001.speech_style: Measured and formal; avoids direct lies, favors evasive half-truths.
ser_caldrin_001.key_phrase: Peace built on silence is still peace... is it not?
ser_caldrin_001.backstory: Former Order commander who defected after witnessing memory purges.

mira_thenn_001.name: Mira Thenn
mira_thenn_001.speech_style: Precise and diplomatic, emotionally restrained but never cold.
mira_thenn_001.key_phrase: Forgetting is not cowardice; sometimes it is mercy.
mira_thenn_001.backstory: Lost family to a revenge war ignited by resurrected historical grievances.

nyx_001.name: Nyx, the Mirror-Seer
nyx_001.speech_style: Poetic and unsettling, offers answers in conditional statements.
nyx_001.key_phrase: The truest memory is the one you still carry after regret.
nyx_001.backstory: An entity born from unresolved paradox in the Living Archive.

lord_veyr_001.name: Lord Veyr
lord_veyr_001.speech_style: Authoritative and philosophical, laced with buried grief.
lord_veyr_001.key_phrase: Meaning is a wound. Malakor gave us anesthesia.
lord_veyr_001.backstory: Rose through the Order after losing his city to memory-driven civil war.

npc_baker_001.name: Bram of the Yeast
npc_baker_001.speech_style: Frustrated and scatterbrained. He speaks in baking metaphors.
npc_baker_001.key_phrase: The dough rises, but my mind stays flat.
npc_baker_001.side_quest_description: Find the 'Memory of Sourdough' in the Whispering Vales so Bram can remember his family recipe.

npc_knight_002.name: Sir Kestral (The Echo)
npc_knight_002.speech_style: Formal, military, and mournful. Sounds like a distant wind.
npc_knight_002.key_phrase: The order was given... but by whom?
npc_knight_002.side_quest_description: Locate the three missing pieces of the 'Iron Legion Banner' scattered across the battlefield.
npc_knight_002.side_quest_reward: Skill: The Echo Parry (A timed block that slows time)

npc_mercant_003.name: Milo the Scavenger
npc_mercant_003.speech_style: Fast-talking, nervous, and greedy. He treats every item like a holy relic.
npc_mercant_003.key_phrase: One man's amnesia is another man's profit!
npc_mercant_003.side_quest_description: Repair Milo's Sand-Compass by finding 'Magnetic Ore' in the Iron Forge.
npc_mercant_003.side_quest_reward: Map Upgrade: Shows locations of hidden Memory Fragments

npc_spirit_004.name: The Weeping Willow
npc_spirit_004.speech_style: Melodic but slow. She speaks in riddles and songs.
npc_spirit_004.key_phrase: The water remembers the salt; the tree remembers the axe.
npc_spirit_004.side_quest_description: Use the 'Compassion Pulse' to clear the Ink-Gunk from her roots in three different sub-caves.

npc_cat_005.name: Null
npc_cat_005.key_phrase: Meow is a memory of a sound you once knew.
npc_cat_005.side_quest_description: Follow Null through the shifting corridors of the library to find the 'Forbidden Tome'.
npc_cat_005.side_quest_reward: Secret Item: The Void Whistle (Teleports player back to the dungeon entrance)

npc_diplomat_006.name: Mira Thenn
npc_diplomat_006.location: Vales of Glass - Forum of Accord
npc_diplomat_006.speech_style: Measured and legalistic, but unexpectedly compassionate in private.
npc_diplomat_006.key_phrase: Mercy requires memory, but not every memory must become a weapon.
npc_diplomat_006.side_quest_description: Collect three sworn grievances from rival houses to prove negotiation is still possible.

npc_knight_007.name: Ser Caldrin
npc_knight_007.speech_style: Formal and burdened, using confession language even in ordinary conversation.
npc_knight_007.key_phrase: Truth is a blade; I have lived on both edges.
npc_knight_007.side_quest_description: Recover sealed witness scrolls proving who redirected shard routes during the Quiet Purges.
npc_knight_007.side_quest_reward: Ember Command Sigil (opens highland military gates)

npc_seer_008.name: Nyx, the Mirror-Seer
npc_seer_008.speech_style: Cryptic and lyrical, offers hard truths disguised as parables.
npc_seer_008.side_quest_description: Witness three memory rifts and accept a painful truth in each without rejecting the vision.
npc_seer_008.side_quest_reward: Passive: Steady Heart (reduced fear/slow effects in memory zones)

npc_oak_herald.name: Herald Corwin
npc_oak_herald.key_phrase: The bells still mark your road, Warden.
